query: Are there studies that combine convolutional and recurrent neural network approaches to extract multiple types of features for relation extraction? If so, could you point me to one of them?
criteria: CNN RNN relation extraction multiple features
convolutional recurrent neural network relation extraction multi-feature
combining CNN and RNN for relation extraction

title.value: Relation Extraction: Perspective from Convolutional Neural Networks

recommendation_reason.value: Up to now, relation extraction systems have made extensive use of features generated by linguistic analysis modules.

supported_research_question.value: Up to now, relation extraction systems have made extensive use of features generated by linguistic analysis modules.

method.value: In this work, we depart from these traditional approaches with complicated feature engineering by introducing a convolutional neural network for relation extraction that automatically learns features from sentences and minimizes the dependence on external toolkits and resources.

data_or_scenario.value: We emphasize the relation extraction problem with an unbalanced corpus.

main_conclusion.value: Our model takes advantages of multiple window sizes for filters and pre-trained word embeddings as an initializer on a non-static architecture to improve the performance.

limitations.value: The experimental results show that our system significantly outperforms not only the best baseline systems for relation extraction but also the state-of-the-art systems for relation classification.

relevance_strength.value: Up to now, relation extraction systems have made extensive use of features generated by linguistic analysis modules.

title.value: Relation Extraction with Multi-instance Multi-label Convolutional Neural Networks

recommendation_reason.value: Distant supervision is an efficient approach that automatically generates labeled data for relation extraction (RE).

supported_research_question.value: Distant supervision is an efficient approach that automatically generates labeled data for relation extraction (RE).

method.value: Distant supervision is an efficient approach that automatically generates labeled data for relation extraction (RE).

data_or_scenario.value: Distant supervision is an efficient approach that automatically generates labeled data for relation extraction (RE).

main_conclusion.value: Experimental results show that our approach performs significantly and consistently better than state-of-the-art methods.

limitations.value: However, this approach follows the traditional expressed-at-least-once assumption, and fails to make full use of information across different sentences.

relevance_strength.value: Distant supervision is an efficient approach that automatically generates labeled data for relation extraction (RE).

title.value: Combining Recurrent and Convolutional Neural Networks for Relation Classification

recommendation_reason.value: Combining Recurrent and Convolutional Neural Networks for Relation Classification

supported_research_question.value: This paper investigates two different neural architectures for the task of relation classification: convolutional neural networks and recurrent neural networks.

method.value: combining convolutional and recurrent neural networks using a simple voting scheme

main_conclusion.value: Our neural models achieve state-of-the-art results on the SemEval 2010 relation classification task.

relevance_strength.value: Combining Recurrent and Convolutional Neural Networks for Relation Classification
